title: Nomads play in Mossel Bay
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Mossel Bay Golf Club...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Mossel Bay Golf Club hosted the Southern Cape Nomads' November monthly game on Sunday 10 November.

Despite the early rain and thundershowers, a field of 64 eager players turned out. The weather gradually improved, paving the way for an enjoyable golf day on this favourite Nomads course.

This month's game held special significance, as it included an official visit from the Nomads' national chairperson, Peter Runkel.

The day's standout performances included:

- A Division winner: David Eveleigh, scoring 40 points
- B Division winner: Ant Smith, scoring 39 points
- C Division winner: Eric Nelson, scoring 39 points

The best-playing pair award went to Martin te Groen and Ant Smith, while the best-playing fourball honour was claimed by Jacque Matthee, Ernie Blommaert, Tokkie du Toit and Peter Brown.

"Special thanks go to Christo Langenhoven from the Coastal Group of Companies, our local sponsor for the day, as well as to our national sponsors Diadeo, Hollywoodbets, Taylormade, SAB, and Stella Artois, whose support helps make these monthly games possible," said the club's Jason de Boer.

For more information about the Southern Cape Nomads, visit scnomads.org or follow them on Facebook at Southern Cape Nomads.

Captain Tjoepie Pretorius (left) and Nomads national chairperson Peter Runkel.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
